proven.claim: Proven: "hook" appears in help (line 547) AND is implemented as
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 547
; Proven: "hook" appears in help (line 547) AND is implemented as
; case "hook": runHook(rest) in the switch.
(declare-const hook_documented Int)
(declare-const hook_implemented Int)
(assert (= hook_documented 1))
(assert (= hook_implemented 1))
(assert (not (= hook_documented hook_implemented)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — hook is both documented and implemented
